items.title: Vaccine void means current Ebola outbreak declared international emergency
items.summary: The WHO has classed this outbreak as “extraordinary” due to the lack of therapeutic options and epidemiological trends.

items.title: Tracy Beth Høeg ousted from FDA in wider senior leadership shakeup
items.summary: The wider US HHS is going through a leadership upheaval, as Republicans aim to keep voters on side amid the looming midterm elections.

items.title: Japan’s MHLW approves Boehringer’s Jascayd for IPF and PPF
items.summary: Boehringer Ingelheim has received Japan’s MHLW approval for Jascayd (nerandomilast) to treat adults with IPF and PPF.

items.title: The Ovarian Cancer Opportunity: Overcoming Complexity in Global Studies
items.summary: Ovarian cancer research is entering a pivotal era characterized by increasing complexity for large, global studies.

items.title: FDA approves Enhertu for two HER2-positive early breast cancer indications
items.summary: The FDA has approved Daiichi Sankyo and AstraZeneca’s Enhertu for two new indications in HER2-positive early breast cancer.
